recipes.name: Smelt Iron
recipes.description: Melt down raw ore into usable common metals.

recipes.name: Refine Crystal
recipes.description: Process crystal ore into valuable rare metals.

recipes.name: Process Electronics
recipes.description: Combine rare and common metals into electronic components.

recipes.name: Craft Medical Supplies
recipes.description: Create medical supplies from crystal ore and electronics.

recipes.name: Process Scrap
recipes.description: Convert scrap metal into usable common metals.

recipes.name: Refine Iron Ore
recipes.description: Purify iron ore into high-quality common metals.

recipes.name: Forge Alloy Composite
recipes.description: Combine common and rare metals into a high-strength alloy.

recipes.name: Purify Crystal
recipes.description: Refine raw crystal ore into ultra-pure crystalline material.

recipes.name: Advanced Electronics
recipes.description: Craft high-grade electronics from purified crystals and salvaged components.

recipes.name: Forge Reinforced Plating
recipes.description: Fuse alloy composite with combat salvage to produce heavy-duty hull plating.
recipes.discovery_hint: Master alloy forging to unlock this blueprint.

recipes.name: Assemble Overclocked Scanner
recipes.description: Combine precision electronics with charged filaments for a high-gain sensor array.
recipes.discovery_hint: Master advanced electronics assembly to reveal this schematic.

recipes.name: Forge Plasma Conduit
recipes.description: Channel purified crystal through resonance cores to build a plasma relay module.
recipes.discovery_hint: Master crystal purification to unlock this blueprint.

recipes.name: Assemble Thermal Visor
recipes.description: Integrate anomalous samples into optics for ground-level thermal imaging.

recipes.name: Fabricate Breaching Charge
recipes.description: Pack weapons-grade material with combat salvage into a directional charge.

recipes.name: Synthesize Stellarium Ingot
recipes.description: Forge rare metals and alloy under catalytic pressure to produce a lustrous trade ingot.

recipes.name: Forge Titan Plating
recipes.description: Layer reinforced plating with plasma-fused conduits and stellarium for near-impervious hull armor.
recipes.discovery_hint: Master reinforced plating fabrication to reveal this advanced blueprint.

recipes.name: Assemble Command Array
recipes.description: Integrate an overclocked scanner with thermal optics and signal amplifiers into a unified command suite.
recipes.discovery_hint: Master overclocked scanner assembly to unlock this schematic.

recipes.name: Forge Nova Core
recipes.description: Bind a plasma conduit around twin resonance cores and stellarium to create a devastating energy weapon.
recipes.discovery_hint: Master plasma conduit forging to unlock this blueprint.

recipes.name: Synthesize Adrenal Compound
recipes.description: Distill combat stimulants with anomalous biological samples into a potent adrenaline booster for ground ops.

recipes.name: Forge Phantom Module
recipes.description: Weave stolen sensor signatures with signal fragments into an active countermeasure that bends scanner returns.

recipes.name: Brew Fortified Stims
recipes.description: Catalyze combat stimulants with flux residue and charged filaments. The result is twice as potent and three times as illegal.

recipes.name: Refine Rare Ore
recipes.description: Extract platinum-group elements from rare ore deposits.

recipes.name: Reclaim Rare Parts
recipes.description: Strip military-grade components from salvaged hardware and reforge them into weapons assemblies.

recipes.name: Synthesize Phase Lattice
recipes.description: Align resonance cores with salvaged signal data to grow a phase-stable crystal matrix.
recipes.discovery_hint: Master crystal purification to reveal this synthesis process.

recipes.name: Distill Refined Propellant
recipes.description: Compress and stabilize raw ore byproducts into high-yield thruster propellant.

recipes.name: Forge Combat Alloy
recipes.description: Reprocess hull fragments from combat wreckage together with iron ore and stripped circuit boards.

recipes.name: Synthesize Neural Weave
recipes.description: Encode biological signal patterns from anomalous ground sites into charged synthetic fiber.
recipes.discovery_hint: Master advanced electronics assembly to uncover this synthesis process.

recipes.name: Fabricate EMP Grenade
recipes.description: Pack salvaged capacitor banks with signal-sensitive detonators and a catalytic charge.

recipes.name: Assemble Arc Emitter Array
recipes.description: Mount a phase lattice emitter core onto recovered combat housing. Cuts through shields before sensors register the shot.
recipes.discovery_hint: Master phase lattice synthesis to unlock this blueprint.

recipes.name: Forge Shield Capacitor Bank
recipes.description: Wire charged filaments through a high-density alloy casing tuned to shield frequency harmonics.
recipes.discovery_hint: Master alloy forging to unlock this blueprint.

recipes.name: Assemble Deep-Scan Probe
recipes.description: Calibrate a purified crystal resonator against recovered navigation data for a mineral survey probe.

recipes.name: Synthesize Black-Market Serum
recipes.description: Process restricted biotech compounds alongside anomalous samples and pharmaceutical stock.

recipes.name: Forge Resonant Drill Array
recipes.description: Tune alloy composite at harmonic frequencies with catalytic flux to produce a drill head that shatters rock faster.
recipes.discovery_hint: Master alloy forging to unlock this blueprint.

recipes.name: Assemble Seismic Bore Engine
recipes.description: Mount a resonant drill onto twin resonance cores and a purified crystal housing for deep-asteroid penetration.
recipes.discovery_hint: Master the resonant drill to unlock this blueprint.

recipes.name: Assemble Precision Extractor Array
recipes.description: Integrate high-grade electronics with charged filaments and alloy servos for precise salvage extraction.
recipes.discovery_hint: Master advanced electronics assembly to unlock this blueprint.

recipes.name: Forge Quantum Salvage Suite
recipes.description: Bind a precision extractor with phase lattice sensors and charged filament relays for quantum-enhanced salvage.
recipes.discovery_hint: Master precision extractor assembly to unlock this blueprint.

recipes.name: Forge Catalyst Forge Module
recipes.description: Line an alloy chamber with charged catalytic filaments and precision electronics for improved refining output.
recipes.discovery_hint: Master alloy forging to unlock this blueprint.

recipes.name: Forge Stellarium Crucible
recipes.description: Fuse a catalyst forge module with stellarium, resonance cores, and purified crystal for near-perfect synthesis yields.
recipes.discovery_hint: Master the catalyst forge to unlock this blueprint.
